song.title: Jesus, The Name High Over All
song.author: Charles Wesley, Carl Gotthelf Glaser, Lowell Mason
song.lyrics: [v1] 1) Jesus, the name high over all, In hell, or earth, or sky: Angels and men before it fall, And devils fear and fly. [v2] 2) Jesus, the name to sinners dear, The name to sinners giv’n; It scatters all their guilty fear, It brings them peace of heav’n. [v3] 3) Jesus the prisoner’s fetters breaks, And bruises Satan’s head; Pow’r into strengthless souls He speaks, And life into the dead. [v4] 4) Oh, that the world might taste and see, The riches of His grace! The arms of love that compass me, Would all mankind embrace. [v5] 5) Him as my righteousness I show, His saving truth proclaim; ’Tis all my business here below, To cry, “Behold the Lamb!” [v6] 6) Happy, if with my latest breath I may but gasp His name; Preach Him to all, and cry in death, “Behold, behold the Lamb!” [E] 1) Jesus, the name high over all, In hell, or earth, or sky Angels and men before it fall, And devils fear and fly 2) Jesus, the name to sinners dear, The name to sinners giv’n It scatters all their guilty fear, It brings them peace of heav’n 3) Jesus the prisoner’s fetters breaks, And bruises Satan’s head Pow’r into strengthless souls He speaks, And life into the dead 4) Oh, that the world might taste and see, The riches of His grace! The arms of love that compass me, Would all mankind embrace 5) Him as my righteousness I show, His saving truth proclaim ’Tis all my business here below, To cry, “Behold the Lamb!” 6) Happy, if with my latest breath I may but gasp His name Preach Him to all, and cry in death, “Behold, behold the Lamb!”
